channel.title: Pigsty – Category: FUNC
channel.description: Recent content in Category: FUNC on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: gzip
item.description:
Overview

PGDG 3rd Party Extension: pg_gzip : gzip and gunzip functions.

Information

  • ID: 3000
  • Name: gzip
  • Alias: pg_gzip
  • Category: FUNC
  • Website: https://github.com/pramsey/pgsql-gzip
  • License: MIT License
  • Language: C
  • Tags: N/A
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 1.0
  • PG Vers: 16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Not Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PGDG
  • RPM Name: pgsql_gzip_$v*
  • RPM Ver : 1.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PIGSTY
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-gzip
  • DEB Ver : 1.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details
